notes: Authored from the Azure Blob Storage REST API docs, covering the three blob operations the adaptor wraps: uploadBlob (Put Blob), downloadBlob (Get Blob), getBlobProperties (Get Blob Properties / HEAD). The adaptor uses the @azure/storage-blob SDK; the real REST responses carry metadata in headers with binary/no bodies, so responses are modelled as JSON objects matching the SDK/adaptor result shapes. Server URL uses the {account}.blob.core.windows.net template.
